deathPlace.address: Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
The origin of Grace Bett(?) is unknown and Torrey's marriage index suggests four versions of the surname. The marriage record is difficult to read and Torrey wrote "Grace Belt? Bell? Burr? Butt?" 

While her husband is buried in Woodstock,CT, the reference to her on the monument is likely a cenotaph. From A Genealogical and Historical Register of the Descendants of Edward Morris of Roxbury, Mass., and Woodstock, Conn.:

"How long our good but distant grandmother, Grace, the widow of Edward Morris, remained in Woodstock we do not know. We find her death, June 6, 1705, recorded in Roxbury, where, perhaps, she may have returned either to visit or make her home with her married daughters, the Childs, or with her son Samuel. The place of her burial is not known. The compiler supposes it to have been in the ancient burying-ground at the corner of Washington and Eustis streets in Roxbury, or possibly in the buring-ground at West Roxbury Village,; but no stone marks it in either place."

zh.lifeSummary: Grace Bett是Thomas Bett的女兒，於1634年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州。她於1655年與Edward Morris在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1705年6月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Grace Bett是Thomas Bett的女儿，于1634年出生在美国马萨诸塞州。她于1655年与Edward Morris在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1705年6月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Bett(e). When feminine it was usually a pet form of Beatrice but possibly also Elizabeth. When masculine it was a pet form of Bertram or Bertelmew (see Bartholomew ).

variants.name: Betts
meanings: English: variant of Bett , with excrescent -s, a patronymic or metronymic from the medieval personal name Bett, a short form of Bartholomew, Beatrice, or Elizabeth.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bertilmew, Bertelmy, a borrowing of the Old French form of the Biblical personal name Bartholomew (from Latin Bartholomaeus; Hebrew ‘son of Talmai’, said to mean ‘having many furrows’, i.e. rich in land). This was an extremely popular personal name in Christian Europe, with many vernacular derivatives. It derived its popularity from the apostle Saint Bartholomew (Matthew 10:3), who was, among other things, the patron saint of tanners, vintners, and butlers.
As an Irish name, it has been used as an Anglicized form of Mac Pharthaláin (see McFarlane ).

variants.name: Betty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Jean-Paul.
English: from a diminutive of the Middle English personal name Bett(e) (see Bett ).
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ).

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: Grace Bett was born in 1634, in Massachusetts, United States as the daughter of Thomas Bett. She married Edward Morris in 1655, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 6 June 1705, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71.

it.lifeSummary: Grace Bett è nata il nel 1634 nel Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America come figlia di Thomas Bett. Lei sposato Edward Morris nel 1655, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 giugno 1705, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Bettは1634年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州でThomas Bettの娘として生まれた。1655年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでEdward Morrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1705年6月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Bett(은)는 1634년 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 Thomas Bett의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1655년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Edward Morris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1705년 6월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Grace Bett nasceu em 1634, em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América filha de Thomas Bett. Ela casou-se com Edward Morris em 1655, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de junho de 1705, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Grace Bett родилась в 1634 г. в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Её отца звали Thomas Bett. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Morris в 1655 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 6 июня 1705 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Grace Bett nació en 1634, en Masachusets, Estados Unidos como hija de Thomas Bett. Se casó con Edward Morris en 1655, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de junio de 1705, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años.

th.Massachusetts, United States: แมสซาซูเซตส์, สหรัฐอเมริกา
